channel.title: The Orcool Blog
channel.description: Data-backed writing on AI ad creative, creative scoring and category signals.

item.title: What makes an AI-generated ad convert? We scored the formats head to head.
item.description: Two AI-built ads, one app, scored blind on Google's ABCD framework. The agent-built testimonial hit 0.76; a leading single-tool generator hit 0.49. The gap was not polish.
